goal: For my child to thrive medically, emotionally, and socially

values.label: Life Participation
values.description: Being able to do the things you love — school, friends, activities, and everything that makes life meaningful

values.label: Survival
values.description: Reducing the risk of life-threatening complications

values.label: Kidney Health
values.description: Keeping your kidneys as healthy as they can be

values.label: Preventing Infections
values.description: Protecting your body from getting sick, especially from infections that can be serious after a transplant
